question: Do inanimate objects come alive in Beauty and the Beast?
context: Beauty and the Beast features a castle full of items that move and speak on their own.
An inanimate object is one that is not alive in any way.
Main characters of Beauty and the Beast include a talking teacup and a sassy duster.
response:
<reasoning>
Beauty and the Beast features a castle where items move and speak on their own.
The main characters include a talking teacup and a sassy duster.
A talking teacup and a sassy duster are inanimate objects that are depicted as alive.
Inanimate objects come alive in Beauty and the Beast.
<answer> Yes
claims: Beauty and the Beast features a castle where items move and speak on their own
The main characters include a talking teacup and a sassy duster
A talking teacup and a sassy duster are inanimate objects that are depicted as alive
Inanimate objects come alive in Beauty and the Beast
